name: F56 - Create AND remove TLD block rule (full lifecycle)
description: Open Manage Rules screen, tap Add FAB, select Top-Level Domain type, enter a real IANA TLD that is NOT in the bundled rules (.museum), save, verify the new rule appears, then delete it and verify removal. Self-cleaning to keep the dev DB pristine.
prerequisites: F73 bundled YAML loaded (1638 individual rules expected)
Test TLD (.museum) is NOT pre-existing in bundled rules (verified during Sprint 35 F69 execution)

test_data.rationale: Real IANA TLD, sponsored/restricted (museums only), not present in bundled spam TLD list. Avoids collision with the bundled .xyz/.cc/.store entries that caused Sprint 35 ambiguity.

steps.comment: Open Settings (header opens account-selection dialog first per Sprint 35 finding)
Pick first account in selection dialog
Open Manage Rules from Settings General tab
Verify FAB present
Tap FAB to open manual rule creation screen
Verify ManualRuleCreateScreen loaded
Select TLD rule type
Focus the input field (name changes to 'Enter TLD...' after radio selection)
Enter a real IANA TLD that is not in the bundled spam list, so we can unambiguously identify and remove our test rule
Wait for pattern preview to generate
Verify generated pattern preview contains source TLD
Use ww_invoke (UIA pattern) since Save Rule may be off-screen at 1600x900
Confirm save in dialog
Wait for save and return to Manage Rules
Back at Manage Rules screen
Focus search bar to filter for our test rule
Search for the test TLD
Wait for filter to apply
VERIFY CREATE: the new .museum block rule appears in filtered list
Open rule detail to use the dialog Delete button (avoids ambiguity if list shows multiple rules)
Rule detail dialog opened
Tap Delete in the rule detail dialog
Wait for confirmation dialog
Confirm deletion in second dialog (Manage Rules screen Delete confirmation)
VERIFY DELETE: .museum rule is no longer in the filtered list
Clear search filter to restore default Manage Rules view
